title: H1: onboarding-generator drift check — catalog hook sets covered by every generator inventory
action: Per H1 (CONTEXT.md): add a drift row to skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs that imports hooks/catalog.mjs and derives the per-runtime expected hook-handler filename sets via renderProjection('claude') / renderProjection('codex') (the CATALOG table itself is NOT exported — checker; renderProjection already filters per runtime at catalog.mjs:224, so no ALLOWED_DIFFERENCES arithmetic is needed for per-runtime sets; extract script filenames from the rendered command strings), and asserts each onboarding generator inventory in onboard_bee.mjs covers its runtime's set: the vendored-hook list (~:122), the Claude settings template (~:1543), and the codex repo-projection template (~:1639). Derive the generator sides from what onboarding actually RENDERS into a fixture (the suite already stages fixtures) rather than parsing source text, so the row survives refactors. A hook present in the catalog but missing from a generator fails RED naming the hook and the lagging inventory. Prove falsifiability once in the report: temporarily remove one hook from a generator-rendered fixture copy, observe RED, restore, rerun green (never commit the red state). Sync .claude/.agents mirrors (self-onboard). FINAL STEP: node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write, then the cell verify.

truths: a catalog hook absent from any generator inventory fails the suite RED naming hook + inventory
falsifiability proven once (RED observed, restored, green)
artifacts: the RED falsifiability output quoted in the report
prohibitions: no edits outside bounded files (manifest via --write only)

trace.outcome: Added H1 drift-check row to test_onboard_bee.mjs: imports hooks/catalog.mjs, derives per-runtime hook script sets via renderProjection('claude')/('codex'), and asserts three onboarding generators (HOOK_FILENAMES vendored list, renderRepoHookEntries Claude settings template, renderCodexHookEntries Codex repo-projection template) each cover their runtime's catalog set, reading the generator side from a fresh onboarding fixture rather than source text. Falsifiability proven: removing bee-chain-nudge.mjs from renderCodexHookEntries turned the new row (and two pre-existing Codex-projection checks) RED naming the missing hook, then restored to green. Mirrors synced; release-manifest.json rewritten via --write.
trace.verify_output: test_onboard_bee.mjs: PASS - failures: 0, skipped: 1 (includes 3 new drift-check rows: vendored-hook list, Claude settings template, Codex repo-projection template all cover hooks/catalog.mjs). release_manifest --check: 146 file(s) match stored manifest.
